scene1_hook: In just one second, over a thousand animals are abandoned.
scene2_problem: Every day, shelters are overwhelmed with unwanted pets. One in five dogs and one in three cats will be euthanized simply because there's no room for them.
scene3_stakes: Imagine your own beloved pet being left behind, with no second chance. The heartbreaking reality is that this is happening every minute, everywhere.
scene4_solution: At We Are Cats and Dogs.org, we're on a mission to give these abandoned animals a second chance at life. Your donation enables our network of foster families and adoption centers to provide vital care and forever homes.
scene5_ask: Donate $25 today to help us provide shelter, food, and a loving home for just one animal. Visit cmd.org to make your gift count.

rolling_credits.header: A Production of We Are Cats and Dogs.org
